title: Simply Supported Beam Analysis
description: Analyse simply supported beams for distributed and point loading.

L.description: Beam Span, L. Symbol: L. Units: mm. Length of your Beam

support_a.description: Support at A. Symbol: S_{A}. Support type at end A

support_b.description: Support at B. Symbol: S_{B}. Support type at end B

DL_mag.description: Distributed Load Magnitude. Symbol: D_{L}. Units: kN/m. The uniform distributed load magnitude on your beam

PL_mag.description: Point Load Magnitude. Symbol: D_{L}. Units: kN. Magnitude of the point load

PL_dist.description: Point Load Distance, d. Symbol: PL_{d}. Units: mm. Distance of point load from the start of the member

E.description: Young's Modulus (E). Symbol: E. Units: MPa. Young's Modulus of your material

I_z.description: Moment of Inertia about Z. Symbol: I_z. Units: mm^4. Moment of Inertia about Z Axis

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
